# GenX Trading Copilot Rules
- Python 3.13+, pandas/numpy/backtrader/ccxt for Forex/Gold algo trading
- Type hints everywhere, pytest in /tests/ (>80% coverage)
- src/ layout, ruff linting, GitHub Actions CI
- Environment: COPILOT_PYTHON_VERSION=3.13, TRADING_API_KEY, DB_CONNECTION=sqlite:///./trades.db

Trading focus: A6-9V org algorithm trading repos [https://github.com/A6-9V]
